central_schemes.name: MGNREGS (MNREGA)
central_schemes.benefit: 100 days guaranteed wage employment at Rs 220-350/day + assets creation
central_schemes.eligibility: All rural adult household willing to do unskilled manual work

central_schemes.name: PM Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
central_schemes.benefit: All-weather road connectivity to villages (public infrastructure)
central_schemes.eligibility: Unconnected villages > 500 population (250 in hilly areas)

central_schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
central_schemes.benefit: Free residential skill training + guaranteed placement with Rs 1.5-3L salary
central_schemes.eligibility: Rural youth aged 15-35 from poor/MGNREGA families

central_schemes.name: National Rural Livelihoods Mission (NRLM-Aajeevika)
central_schemes.benefit: SHG formation, credit linkage, skill training, marketing support

central_schemes.name: Shyama Prasad Mukherji Rurban Mission
central_schemes.benefit: Urban facilities (roads, sanitation, digital) in rural clusters

central_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Awaas Yojana – Gramin
central_schemes.benefit: Rs 1.20-1.30 lakh grant for building pucca house + MGNREGA labour wages
central_schemes.eligibility: Houseless/kutcha house families in SECC 2011 list

central_schemes.name: PM Jal Jeevan Mission
central_schemes.benefit: Tap water connection to every rural household
central_schemes.eligibility: All rural households without functional tap water

central_schemes.name: Watershed Development Fund (NABARD)
central_schemes.benefit: Participatory watershed management to address water scarcity

central_schemes.name: PM Electricity to Villages (Saubhagya)
central_schemes.benefit: Free household electrification for BPL rural households

central_schemes.name: Gram Ujala Programme
central_schemes.benefit: LED bulbs at Rs 10/bulb for rural households

central_schemes.name: BharatNet (Rural Broadband)
central_schemes.benefit: High-speed internet connectivity to gram panchayats

central_schemes.name: Common Service Centres (CSC) Scheme
central_schemes.benefit: Digital services (certificates, banking, e-governance) at village level
central_schemes.eligibility: All rural citizens needing government services

central_schemes.name: Integrated Tribal Development Programme
central_schemes.benefit: Infrastructure + welfare convergence for tribal areas
central_schemes.eligibility: ST residents in scheduled tribal areas

state_schemes.benefit_en: Online land records, Khatauni, Khasra accessible free
Safe tap water connection to every rural/urban household
state_schemes.benefit_hi: हर घर तक सुरक्षित पेयजल कनेक्शन
state_schemes.eligibility: All Telangana households without safe water connection
